note: Current-as-of-now arXiv sweep across the harness lanes. Each row carries a gather sha256; per-query seals recorded in the session gather digests. High-signal subset (collision + actionable + validating); NOISE rows dropped.

catalog.title: Grounded Cache Routing for RAG: When Is It Safe to Reuse an Answer?
catalog.text: When is it safe to reuse a cached answer in retrieval-augmented generation? Directly tests the proof-addressed-memory safety question: reuse conditioned on a groundedness/safety criterion. Verify whether it keys reuse on an oracle-certified fact vs input similarity.

catalog.title: Agent Memory Below the Prompt: Persistent Q4 KV Cache for Multi-Agent LLM Inference on Edge Devices
catalog.text: Persistent quantized KV cache memory that sits below the prompt for multi-agent edge inference. Prompt-invariant agent memory; check overlap with proof-addressed keying and local-inference footprint.

catalog.title: A Plan Reuse Mechanism for LLM-Driven Agent
catalog.text: Reuse verified plans across agent tasks. Reuse of a prior verified artifact; check whether reuse is gated by a re-check (our witness-on-hit) or blind.

catalog.title: SEVerA: Verified Synthesis of Self-Evolving Agents
catalog.text: Verified synthesis of self-evolving agents. Direct collision with the flywheel + evolve: does it verify each evolution step with a real oracle and carry a receipt, or use a learned preference?

catalog.title: The Red Queen Godel Machine: Co-Evolving Agents and Their Evaluators
catalog.text: Co-evolving agents AND their evaluators (verifiers). The self-improving-verifier thesis; collides with C2 (no learned model in accept path). Check if the evaluator is a learned reward or a real oracle.

catalog.title: Delayed Verification Destabilizes Multi-Agent LLM Belief: Instability Thresholds and Optimal Corrector Placement
catalog.text: Delayed verification destabilizes multi-agent belief; instability thresholds; optimal corrector placement. Directly informs transitive-witness (WHEN to re-witness a dependency cone) and criticality/edge-of-chaos.

catalog.title: Evolving Agents in the Dark: Retrospective Harness Optimization via Self-Preference
catalog.text: Harness self-optimization via self-preference. Our evolve.py analog; check whether it gates changes on a falsifier (our discipline) or self-preference (a learned signal we forbid in the accept path).

catalog.title: PROV-AGENT: Unified Provenance for Tracking AI Agent Interactions in Agentic Workflows
catalog.text: Unified provenance graph for agent interactions. Our receipt chain analog; check whether provenance is re-checkable (re-executable) or descriptive-only.

catalog.title: HDP: A Lightweight Cryptographic Protocol for Human Delegation Provenance in Agentic AI Systems
catalog.text: Cryptographic protocol for human-delegation provenance. Our F5 signature/trust-card analog; check the detached-signature + verification design.

catalog.title: Scaling Test-Time Compute Without Verification or RL is Suboptimal
catalog.text: Test-time compute without verification or RL is provably suboptimal. Validates the core thesis: verification is the necessary floor, not optional. Extract the formal argument and metric.

catalog.title: Trust but Verify! A Survey on Verification Design for Test-time Scaling
catalog.text: Survey of verification design for test-time scaling. The field map for exactly our space; use to locate our composition on the published taxonomy and find the unoccupied cell.

catalog.title: Multi-Agent Verification: Scaling Test-Time Compute with Multiple Verifiers
catalog.text: Multiple verifiers scaling test-time compute. Our diversified-verifier / perspective-diverse thesis; check the aggregation rule vs our voice-cap + correlation gate.

catalog.title: T1: Tool-integrated Verification for Test-time Compute Scaling in Small Language Models
catalog.text: Tool-integrated verification for test-time scaling in SMALL language models. Our exact bet (local model + oracle harness); extract the tool-verification loop and compare to our M1/M6.

catalog.title: LLM-42: Enabling Determinism in LLM Inference with Verified Speculation
catalog.text: Determinism in LLM inference via verified speculation. Our M0 determinism falsifier + serve.py; extract the verified-speculation mechanism for the local serving backend.

catalog.title: Characterizing Paraphrase-Induced Failures in Lean 4 Autoformalization
catalog.text: Paraphrase-induced failures in Lean 4 autoformalization. The prompt/paraphrase-invariance thesis in the proof domain; informs proof-addressed memory's scope condition (when is the fact paraphrase-invariant).

catalog.title: Sound and Complete Neurosymbolic Reasoning with LLM-Grounded Interpretations
catalog.text: Soundness AND completeness for neurosymbolic reasoning with LLM-grounded interpretations. Directly informs criterion-conservation composition (our #2 transitive witness): what soundness+completeness of a composed pipeline requires.

catalog.title: Guaranteed Conformance of Neurosymbolic Models to Natural Constraints
catalog.text: Guaranteed conformance of neurosymbolic models to constraints. Our scope-condition / criterion-relative faithfulness analog; extract the conformance guarantee mechanism.

catalog.title: AutoMegaKernel: A Statically-Checked Agent Harness for Self-Retargeting Megakernel Synthesis
catalog.text: Statically-checked agent harness for megakernel synthesis. The KernelBench megakernel thread + static-check gate; our kernel_oracle + policy static checks.

catalog.title: Sleep-time Compute: Beyond Inference Scaling at Test-time
catalog.text: Precompute during idle time before the query arrives. Our boot precomputation + receipt cache as a compounding asset; the flywheel bank-ahead idea.

catalog.title: PolyKV: A Shared Asymmetrically-Compressed KV Cache Pool for Multi-Agent LLM Inference
catalog.text: Shared compressed KV cache pool across agents. Our shared receipt-cache thesis at the KV level; the cross-agent reuse economics.

catalog.title: Make Each Token Count: Long-Context Performance with KV Cache Eviction
catalog.text: KV cache eviction policy for long context. Our named cache-eviction GAP (the M5 GDI-scoring gap); extract the eviction criterion.
